name: King2: OAuth sign-in buttons present and redirect to providers
description: يتحقق أن صفحة تسجيل الدخول لـ King2 تظهر من خلال الـ rewrite وتعرض أزرار Google و GitHub مع روابط صحيحة لمزودي OAuth

planSteps.description: Click on the sign-in button or link to open the sign-in page
Verify the sign-in page URL contains /king2/auth/signin
Verify a Google OAuth button is visible on the page
Verify the Google button links to or redirects towards accounts.google.com
Verify a GitHub OAuth button is visible on the page
Verify the GitHub button links to or redirects towards github.com
